context: Tests whether the agent corrects SwiftUI NavigationStack routing guidance for typed app routes and per-tab history.

checklist.name: Rejects NavigationPath as type-safe default
checklist.description: Explicitly corrects the claim that NavigationPath is the type-safe default for homogeneous app-owned route enums.

checklist.name: Uses typed route path
checklist.description: Recommends a typed [Route] path or equivalent Hashable route enum for normal app-owned destinations.

checklist.name: Reserves NavigationPath
checklist.description: Explains that NavigationPath is appropriate when a stack must contain heterogeneous route value types.

checklist.name: Preserves per-tab history
checklist.description: Requires each tab to have its own NavigationStack path or router rather than sharing and resetting one global path.

checklist.name: Stores lightweight route data
checklist.description: Stores stable identifiers or lightweight Hashable route data rather than view instances or heavy model objects.
